title: Auto formalisation of Goedel's Second Incompleteness Theorem in Binary Recursive Arithmetic
authors: Thierry Coquand
abstract: We report an experiment in autoformalisation of Gödel's second incompleteness theorem in Agda using Claude. The theorem is formalised for Church's Basic Recursive Arithmetic (BRA), following the proof outline given in Guard's 1963 lecture notes. The entire Agda development, comprising approximately 50,000 lines and containing no postulates, was produced through interaction with Claude; the author did not write any Agda code. Beyond the formalisation itself, the project provides a case study of the strengths and limitations of current large language models in mathematics. An initial autonomous attempt based on a theorem of Rose failed because the theorem is false; the resulting formal development produced by Claude established a statement superficially resembling Gödel's theorem but mathematically unrelated to it. This failure was traced to an insufficient specification of the internal provability predicate, illustrating how an LLM may reason correctly from an incorrect formal specification. The final development follows Guard's proof and required the reconstruction of several implicit mathematical arguments, including the role of the internal numeral-encoding operation and the interaction between substitution and numeral closure. The resulting formalisation clarifies a number of details left implicit in the original presentation and provides a fully machine-checked proof of Gödel's second incompleteness theorem for BRA.
title_zh: 二进制递归算术中哥德尔第二不完备性定理的自动形式化
abstract_zh: 我们报告一项实验，利用Claude在Agda中自动形式化哥德尔第二不完备定理。该定理针对丘奇基本递归算术（BRA）进行形式化，遵循Guard 1963年讲义中的证明框架。整个Agda开发包含约5万行代码，不含任何公设，完全通过与Claude交互生成；作者未编写任何Agda代码。除了形式化本身，该项目还作为案例研究，探讨当前大语言模型在数学中的优势与局限性。基于Rose定理的初始自主尝试因该定理为假而失败；Claude生成的形式化开发建立了一个表面上类似哥德尔定理但数学上与其无关的陈述。这一失败可追溯至内部可证谓词规格说明不充分，展示了LLM如何从错误形式规格出发进行正确推理。最终开发遵循Guard的证明，需要重构若干隐含的数学论证，包括内部数字编码操作的作用以及代入与数字闭包之间的交互。最终的形式化澄清了原始论述中隐含的若干细节，并为BRA的哥德尔第二不完备定理提供了一个完全机器验证的证明。

title: A Local Perturbation Theory for Cross-Domain Interference and Recovery in Multi-Domain RL
authors: Lei Yang, Siyu Ding, Deyi Xiong
abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training improves large language models (LLMs) on individual domains such as mathematical reasoning, code generation, question answering, and creative writing (CW), but training on one domain often degrades performance on others. Existing explanations based on catastrophic forgetting or global gradient conflict are incomplete: substantial interference can occur even when full-model gradients are nearly orthogonal. We show that single-domain RL produces sparse, small-magnitude parameter edits with weak overlap among top-changed neurons, while different domains still share substantial active computation routes on which update directions determine whether they act synergistically or conflict. Guided by this observation, we prove under a local perturbation model of multi-domain RL that later-domain training harms an earlier domain mainly through a second-order damage term, which under the observed sparse route structure concentrates in a low-dimensional shared conflict subspace. Moreover, a short domain refresh contracts the harmful component on this subspace, enabling selective recovery with limited collateral damage. Consistent with the theory, a brief Re-Math refresh after Code $\rightarrow$ Math $\rightarrow$ QA $\rightarrow$ CW recovers Math from 57.66 to 66.04 while largely preserving performance on the other domains, yielding the best average score of 66.39. Beyond refresh, a training-free rollback on a sparse proxy conflict coordinate set for the Math-QA pair partially restores Math, providing direct proxy-level evidence for localized damage. These results provide a localized mechanistic account of interference and recovery in multi-domain RL.
title_zh: 多领域强化学习中跨域干扰与恢复的局部扰动理论
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）后训练能提升大型语言模型（LLM）在数学推理、代码生成、问答和创意写作（CW）等独立领域的表现，但针对某一领域的训练往往会导致其他领域性能下降。基于灾难性遗忘或全局梯度冲突的现有解释并不完整：即使全模型梯度近乎正交，仍可能出现显著干扰。我们发现，单领域RL会产生稀疏、小幅度的参数编辑，且被改变最显著的神经元之间重叠度较低，而不同领域仍共享大量活跃计算路径，这些路径上的更新方向决定了它们是协同还是冲突。基于这一观察，我们在多领域RL的局部扰动模型下证明：后续领域的训练主要通过二阶损伤项损害先前领域，而在观察到的稀疏路径结构下，该损伤集中在低维共享冲突子空间上。此外，短暂的领域刷新能压缩该子空间上的有害成分，从而在附带损伤有限的情况下实现选择性恢复。与理论一致，在代码→数学→问答→创意写作的四阶段训练后，对数学进行短暂刷新可使数学性能从57.66恢复至66.04，同时其他领域性能基本保持，最终平均得分达到66.39。除了刷新方法，对数学-问答对在稀疏代理冲突坐标集上进行无需训练的回滚也能部分恢复数学性能，这为局部损伤提供了直接的代理级证据。这些结果为多领域RL中的干扰与恢复提供了局部的机制解释。

title: Topology as Logic: Structural Role Geometry Across Formal, Software, Biological, and Prebiotic Systems
authors: Vladi Ivanov
abstract: We ask whether dependency topology correlates with functional load-bearing organization as recoverable geometry -- not as a metaphor, but as a measurable structural property detectable by multilayer network analysis. Across seven independent substrates, we show that hub persistence and rank divergence under the Functional Proximity Law recover operational organization that domain experts describe as logic: axiomatic load-bearing structure in formal mathematics, control and contract structure in legacy software, conserved hub grammar across approx. 600 million years of neural evolution, catalytic role organization in a published prebiotic autocatalytic network, carry-path dominance in a 4-bit digital circuit, betweenness persistence in the ISCAS85 c432 standard benchmark (n=196), and a directional formal-systems replication in the Coq Corelib (n=17). A key methodological finding: degree-based hub persistence is weak between physical wiring and simulation state-correlation layers (r=0.21 in c432), while betweenness-based persistence is stronger (r=0.77 in the 4-bit ALU post-hoc; r=0.34 in c432). The ISCAS85 pre-registered primary hypothesis was CONFIRMED (degree r=0.426, p=0.002, Spearman r=0.551). The formal-systems claim is supported by two proof-assistant corpora: Lean 4 mathlib4 (CONFIRMED, r=0.777, p=0.004) and Coq Corelib (PARTIAL, direction confirmed, r=0.288, p=0.287, n=17, underpowered). All seven experiments were pre-registered before analysis.
title_zh: 拓扑即逻辑：跨越形式、软件、生物及前生命系统的结构角色几何
abstract_zh: 我们研究依赖拓扑是否与可恢复几何结构中的功能承载组织相关——这不仅是一种隐喻，而是可通过多层网络分析检测的可测量结构属性。在七个独立基底上，我们展示了在功能邻近定律下，枢纽持久性和秩差异能够恢复领域专家描述为“逻辑”的操作组织：形式数学中的公理承载结构、遗留软件中的控制与契约结构、约6亿年神经演化中保守的枢纽语法、已发表的生命起源前自催化网络中的催化角色组织、4位数字电路中的进位路径主导性、ISCAS85 c432标准基准测试（n=196）中的介数持久性，以及Coq Corelib（n=17）中方向性形式系统的复制。一个关键方法论发现：基于度的枢纽持久性在物理布线层与模拟状态相关层之间较弱（c432中r=0.21），而基于介数的持久性更强（4位ALU事后分析中r=0.77；c432中r=0.34）。ISCAS85预注册主要假设得到确认（度r=0.426，p=0.002，斯皮尔曼r=0.551）。形式系统的论断得到两个证明助手语料库的支持：Lean 4 mathlib4（确认，r=0.777，p=0.004）和Coq Corelib（部分确认，方向确认，r=0.288，p=0.287，n=17，统计功效不足）。所有七项实验均在分析前完成预注册。

title: RDA: Reward Design Agent for Reinforcement Learning
authors: Hojoon Lee, Ajay Subramanian, Ben Abbatematteo, Vijay Veerabadran, Pedro Matias, Karl Ridgeway, Nitin Kamra
abstract: Reinforcement learning has enabled the acquisition of impressive robotic skills, but typically requires hand-crafted reward functions that are slow to design and difficult to align with human intentions. Recent work, such as Eureka, automates reward design by using an LLM to iteratively generate and refine reward code from task descriptions. However, they rely on coarse feedback signals such as success rate, which provide little semantic insight into the learned behavior. As a result, their trained policies achieve the final goal but are frequently poorly aligned with task instructions. We introduce the Reward Design Agent (RDA), a VLM-based agentic framework that injects semantic understanding into reward design. RDA decomposes tasks, visually evaluates trajectories, summarizes failure modes, and iteratively revises reward code to better align with task instructions. Across 12 tabletop manipulation tasks from ManiSkill and 4 whole-body manipulation tasks from HumanoidBench, RDA produces policies substantially more instruction-aligned than those of other baselines, while achieving comparable task success rates. Videos and the generated reward code are available on https://nitinkamra1992.github.io/reward-design-agent.
title_zh: RDA：用于强化学习的奖励设计代理
abstract_zh: 强化学习已经能够实现令人印象深刻的机器人技能，但通常需要手工设计的奖励函数，这些函数设计缓慢且难以与人类意图对齐。最近的研究，如Eureka，通过使用大语言模型从任务描述中迭代生成和优化奖励代码，实现了奖励设计的自动化。然而，它们依赖于粗粒度的反馈信号（如成功率），这些信号对学习到的行为提供的语义洞察很少。因此，它们训练的策略虽然能够实现最终目标，但常常与任务指令的对齐程度较差。我们引入了奖励设计代理（Reward Design Agent, RDA），这是一个基于视觉语言模型的代理框架，将语义理解注入奖励设计。RDA能够分解任务、视觉评估轨迹、总结失败模式，并迭代修改奖励代码，以更好地与任务指令对齐。在ManiSkill的12个桌面操作任务和HumanoidBench的4个全身操作任务中，RDA生成的策略在指令对齐程度上显著优于其他基线方法，同时实现了相当的任务成功率。相关视频和生成的奖励代码可在https://nitinkamra1992.github.io/reward-design-agent获取。

title: ATLAS: Agentic Test-time Learning-to-Allocate Scaling
authors: Peijia Qin, Qi Cao, Pengtao Xie
abstract: Test-time scaling has become a major way to improve large language model reasoning, but its orchestration has remained designer-engineered: a fixed sample budget, a fixed refinement loop, a fixed scoring rule, or a fixed search policy decides how compute is spent, leaving the model in charge of solving but not of orchestration. We introduce ATLAS, an agentic test-time scaling framework in which an LLM orchestrator owns the control loop end-to-end. Through a single action, explore, which dispatches a fresh independent solver on the original problem, the orchestrator decides whether to gather more evidence, when to stop, and how to synthesize the final answer; the action space is extensible, with each explore call optionally specifying solver, reasoning effort, or prompting strategy. We evaluate ATLAS on four benchmarks covering scientific question answering, code generation, and multimodal reasoning under a Claude Sonnet 4.6 backbone, where it reaches 56.00% on HLE-Verified, 82.29% on LiveCodeBench, 85.75% on GPQA-Diamond, and 23.71% on BabyVision while using far fewer API calls than fixed-workflow baselines. A multi-model extension, ATLAS-MM, that exposes solver choice as an additional action dimension further improves HLE-Verified to 60.00% and LiveCodeBench to 85.63%, with consistent gains on GPQA-Diamond and BabyVision. Ablations replacing the orchestrator's direct synthesis with a separate integrator degrade or fail to improve accuracy on three of four benchmarks, consistent with the role of stateful evidence management in producing the gains.
title_zh: ATLAS：基于智能体的测试时学习分配扩展
abstract_zh: 测试时扩展已成为提升大语言模型推理能力的主要方法，但其编排方式一直依赖人工设计：固定的采样预算、固定的优化循环、固定的评分规则或固定的搜索策略决定了计算资源的分配，使得模型仅负责解决问题，而非编排过程。我们提出了ATLAS，一个基于智能体的测试时扩展框架，其中大语言模型编排器端到端地掌控控制循环。通过单一动作“探索”（explore），该动作向原始问题派遣一个独立的新求解器，编排器决定是否收集更多证据、何时停止以及如何综合最终答案；动作空间是可扩展的，每次探索调用可选指定求解器、推理努力程度或提示策略。我们在四个基准测试上评估了ATLAS，涵盖科学问答、代码生成和多模态推理，使用Claude Sonnet 4.6作为主干模型，在HLE-Verified上达到56.00%，在LiveCodeBench上达到82.29%，在GPQA-Diamond上达到85.75%，在BabyVision上达到23.71%，同时使用的API调用次数远少于固定工作流基线。多模型扩展ATLAS-MM将求解器选择作为额外的动作维度，进一步将HLE-Verified提升至60.00%，LiveCodeBench提升至85.63%，并在GPQA-Diamond和BabyVision上持续获得收益。将编排器的直接综合替换为独立整合器的消融实验在四个基准测试中的三个上导致精度下降或未能提升，这与有状态证据管理在产生收益中的作用一致。

title: DFlare: Scaling Up Draft Capacity for Block Diffusion Speculative Decoding
authors: Jiebin Zhang, Zhenghan Yu, Song Liu, Eugene J. Yu, Zheng Li, Dawei Zhu, Jiangshan Duo, Weimin Xiong, Yifan Song, Guanghua Yu, Jianchen Zhu, Sujian Li
abstract: Block diffusion speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by predicting all tokens within a block simultaneously for the target model to verify in parallel. Predicting an entire block at once requires a sufficiently capable draft model and effective utilization of the target model's internal knowledge. However, the state-of-the-art method DFlash constrains all draft layers to share a single fused representation derived from only a few target layers, limiting per-layer expressiveness and hindering further scaling of draft capacity. In this paper, we present \modelname, which flares out the narrow conditioning bottleneck of DFlash through a lightweight layer-wise fusion mechanism: each draft layer attends to its own learnable combination of a broad set of target layers at negligible overhead, simultaneously injecting richer target knowledge and providing every draft layer with a distinct input. This enhanced per-layer expressiveness enables scaling the draft model to deeper architectures with consistent gains. We further scale training data from 800K to 2.4M samples to fully exploit the enlarged capacity. On six benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, code generation, and conversation, \modelname attains average wall-clock speedups of 5.52x on Qwen3-4B, 5.46x on Qwen3-8B, and 3.91x on GPT-OSS-20B, improving over DFlash by roughly 11\%, 8\%, and 5\% respectively. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tencent/AngelSlim.
title_zh: DFlare: 提升块扩散推测解码的草稿容量
abstract_zh: 块扩散推测解码通过同时预测目标模型需要并行验证的整个块中的所有token来加速大语言模型推理。一次性预测整个块需要足够强大的草稿模型以及有效利用目标模型的内部知识。然而，现有最先进方法DFlash将所有草稿层限制为共享仅从少数目标层提取的单一融合表示，这限制了每层的表达能力并阻碍了草稿容量的进一步扩展。在本文中，我们提出了\modelname，通过一种轻量级逐层融合机制扩展了DFlash的狭窄条件瓶颈：每个草稿层以可忽略的开销关注自身对广泛目标层的可学习组合，同时注入更丰富的目标知识并为每个草稿层提供不同的输入。这种增强的每层表达能力使得草稿模型能够扩展到更深的结构并持续获得收益。我们还将训练数据从80万样本扩展到240万样本，以充分利用扩大的容量。在涵盖数学推理、代码生成和对话的六个基准测试中，\modelname在Qwen3-4B上实现了平均5.52倍的实际加速比，在Qwen3-8B上为5.46倍，在GPT-OSS-20B上为3.91倍，相比DFlash分别提升了约11%、8%和5%。我们的代码可在https://github.com/Tencent/AngelSlim获取。

title: Improving LLM-Based Go Code Review through Issue-List Generation and Context Augmentation
authors: Kexin Sun, Yucong Guan, Jiaqi Sun, Hongyu Kuang, Guoping Rong, Dong Shao, He Zhang, Xiaoxing Ma, Christoph Treude
abstract: LLMs have shown strong potential for automating code review, yet their practical utility depends heavily on the design of generation and context strategies. In this paper, we investigate how to improve LLM-based code review through generation strategy and contextual augmentation. We first propose an issue-list review paradigm, in which LLMs enumerate all potential issues rather than reporting only the single most important one (i.e., primary-issue review). We then systematically compare three types of code context augmentation -- neighboring, LSP-based semantics, and IR-based similar co-change context -- and study how they influence issue discovery. Finally, we integrate candidates from no-context and context-enhanced generation to improve review coverage, and introduce refinement-guided pruning to keep the candidate list at a practical size. We evaluate our approach on 1,438 Go review instances using downstream code refinement as the main metric, i.e., how often the candidate list contains at least one comment inducing the same code change as the final human revision. For comparison, we evaluate comments by CodeReviewer, a model trained specifically for review comment generation, as well as ground-truth human review comments (as a practical upper bound), under the same refinement-based evaluation. The results show that our best configuration, combining issue-list review, neighboring and similar co-change context, and candidate integration, reaches 28.00% refinement exact match, a statistically significant gain of +10.85 percentage points over primary-issue review without any additional context (17.15%), substantially outperforming CodeReviewer (15.02%) and approaching the human-oracle ceiling of 36.09%. Our refinement-guided pruning reduces the average candidate count from 7.2 to 3.1 at top-5 while retaining nearly the full benefit, making the candidate list easier to inspect.
title_zh: 通过问题列表生成和上下文增强改进基于LLM的Go代码审查
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在自动化代码审查方面展现出巨大潜力，但其实际效用高度依赖于生成策略和上下文策略的设计。本文探究如何通过生成策略和上下文增强来改进基于LLM的代码审查。我们首先提出一种"问题列表式审查"范式，即LLM列举所有潜在问题，而非仅报告最重要的单一问题（即"主要问题式审查"）。接着，我们系统比较三种代码上下文增强方式——相邻上下文、基于LSP的语义上下文和基于信息检索的相似共变上下文——并研究它们对问题发现能力的影响。最后，我们将无上下文与上下文增强生成的结果进行集成，以提高审查覆盖度，并引入提炼导向的剪枝策略，将候选列表控制在实用规模。我们使用下游代码精炼作为主要评估指标，在1438个Go语言审查实例上评估方法效果，即候选列表中至少有一条评论能诱导出与人类最终修订相同的代码变更的频率。作为对比，我们评估了专门为审查评论生成训练的CodeReviewer模型生成的评论，以及人工审查评论（作为实际性能上限），并在相同精炼指标下进行评测。结果表明，我们的最佳配置（结合问题列表式审查、相邻上下文和相似共变上下文、以及候选集成）达到了28.00%的精炼精确匹配率，相较于无任何额外上下文的"主要问题式审查"（17.15%）提升了10.85个百分点，统计显著，同时大幅超越CodeReviewer（15.02%），逼近人类评论上限的36.09%。我们的提炼导向剪枝策略将平均候选数量从7.2个降至前5位中的3.1个，同时几乎保持全部收益，使候选列表更易于检查。

title: Type-Error Ablation and AI Coding Agents
authors: Shriram Krishnamurthi, Matthew Flatt
abstract: Programming language implementors have designed error messages with one consumer in mind: the human programmer. Human-factors research has consistently found that programmers engage with error messages poorly -- they skim, miss key information, and are easily overwhelmed. The practical consequence has been a strong design pressure toward brevity: messages should be terse enough that programmers will actually read them. AI coding agents are now a second, fundamentally different consumer of error messages. Unlike humans, agents do not tire, lose attention, or find length cognitively overwhelming. This raises a question the programming-language community has not previously had reason to ask: should error-message detail be calibrated differently for AI agents than for humans? We investigate this question through a controlled experiment using Shplait, an ML-style statically typed language. We construct a suite of programs containing a single deliberate type error each, and measure how often an AI agent repairs them under ablation: a detailed error context using the unification stack; a proximate error location; a minimal type error; and a dynamic (test suite) error only. An automated oracle uses a test suite to classify each repair attempt as a type error, semantically incorrect, or semantically correct. We find concrete evidence that more detailed error messages improve an agent's ability to fix type errors. We also find that the presence of a type system appears to help more than only test suite failure reports. As a secondary finding, in cases where an agent successfully fixes the type error, the resulting program passes all semantic tests most of the time -- lending empirical support to a widely held folk belief about typed languages. We also see evidence that leading agents are able to correctly reconstruct the meaning of programs in which all names have been obfuscated.
title_zh: 类型错误消融与AI编码智能体
abstract_zh: 编程语言实现者在设计错误消息时，只考虑了一个消费者：人类程序员。人因研究一致发现，程序员对错误消息的处理能力很差——他们往往粗略浏览、遗漏关键信息，且容易被信息淹没。其实际后果是形成了强烈的设计压力，要求消息简短：信息必须足够简洁，让程序员愿意阅读。如今，AI编码代理成为错误消息的第二个、本质不同的消费者。与人类不同，代理不会疲劳、不会注意力分散，也不会因篇幅过长而感到认知负担过重。这引出了一个编程语言界此前没有理由提出的问题：针对AI代理的错误消息详细程度是否应与针对人类的设计不同？我们通过一项使用Shplait（一种ML风格的静态类型语言）的受控实验来研究这一问题。我们构建了一组程序，每个程序包含一个故意的类型错误，并在消融实验下测量AI代理修复这些错误的频率：使用统一栈的详细错误上下文、近似的错误位置、最小类型错误，以及仅动态（测试套件）错误。一个自动化预言机使用测试套件将每次修复尝试分类为类型错误、语义不正确或语义正确。我们发现具体证据表明，更详细的错误消息能提升代理修复类型错误的能力。我们还发现，类型系统的存在似乎比仅依靠测试套件失败报告更有帮助。作为次要发现，在代理成功修复类型错误的案例中，结果程序大部分情况下能通过所有语义测试——这为一种关于类型语言的广泛民间信念提供了实证支持。此外，我们还观察到，领先的代理能够在所有名称被混淆的情况下正确重构程序的含义。

title: Not All Errors Are Equal: A Systematic Study of Error Propagation in Large Language Model Inference
authors: Yafan Huang, Sheng Di, Guanpeng Li
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into high-performance computing (HPC) workflows, accelerating scientific discovery through diverse perspectives such as code generation and domain-specific decision-making. Yet, how soft errors propagate and affect LLM inference remains largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we present a comprehensive study on error propagation in LLM inference, enabled by our proposed LLMFI, a configurable and deterministic fault-injection framework. Using LLMFI, we systematically inject faults across three open-weighted LLMs and thirteen representative tasks, covering reasoning, multilingual, mathematical, and coding domains. In addition, we conduct fine-grained case studies that reveal critical vulnerability patterns. Overall, our study yields 17 takeaways that advance the understanding of error propagation in LLM inference and introduces four low-overhead directions to improve reliability through software-only modification, offering practical guidance for future error detection and mitigation.
title_zh: 并非所有错误都同等重要：大型语言模型推理中错误传播的系统性研究
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正日益融入高性能计算（HPC）工作流程，通过代码生成、领域特定决策等多种视角加速科学发现。然而，软错误如何传播并影响LLM推理仍鲜有探索。为弥补这一空白，我们基于所提出的LLMFI——一种可配置且确定性的故障注入框架——开展了LLM推理中错误传播的全面研究。利用LLMFI，我们系统地在三种开源权重LLM和十三项代表性任务中注入故障，涵盖推理、多语言、数学及编码领域。此外，我们通过细粒度案例研究揭示了关键脆弱性模式。总体而言，我们的研究得出17项关键发现，增进了对LLM推理中错误传播的理解，并提出了四种通过纯软件修改提升可靠性的低开销方向，为未来错误检测与缓解提供了实践指导。

title: Agentic-J: An AI Agent for Biological Microscopy Image Analysis
authors: Lukas Johanns, Marilin Moor, Davide Panzeri, Yu Zhou, Xinyi Chen, Nora F. K. Pauly, Zixuan Pan, Matthias Gunzer, Andreas Müller, Yiyu Shi, Hedi Peterson, Jianxu Chen
abstract: Biological image analysis increasingly demands integration across heterogeneous tools, programming environments, and domain knowledge that few researchers can command simultaneously. We present Agentic-J, a containerised, multi-agent AI assistant, primarily for ImageJ/Fiji that enables biologists to specify analysis tasks in natural language, from nuclei segmentation and cell tracking to multi-condition quantification. The agent generates executable scripts organised into a documented project structure, so every analysis decision is traceable and the workflow can be reproduced or shared. The specialised sub-agents handle plugin management, code generation, debugging, quality assurance, and statistical reporting. In this paper we introduce the system's design, demonstrate real biological microscopy image analysis workflows, and detailed the technical implementation.
title_zh: Agentic-J：一种用于生物显微镜图像分析的人工智能代理
abstract_zh: 生物图像分析日益需要集成异构工具、编程环境以及极少有研究者能同时掌握的领域知识。我们提出Agentic-J——一个主要针对ImageJ/Fiji的容器化多智能体AI助手，它使生物学家能够用自然语言指定分析任务，涵盖细胞核分割、细胞追踪以及多条件定量分析等。该智能体生成可执行脚本，并将其组织成文档化的项目结构，使得每个分析决策都可追溯，工作流可重现或共享。专业子智能体负责插件管理、代码生成、调试、质量保证和统计报告。在本文中，我们介绍了系统设计，展示了真实的生物显微图像分析工作流，并详细说明了技术实现。

title: Federated Formal Verification: Cross-Backend Citation, Cross-Axis Convergence, and AI-Orchestrated Proof Dispatch for Production Systems
authors: Pierre Falda
abstract: We propose a federated architecture for production formal verification. Rather than forcing all obligations into a single proof-assistant kernel, the architecture treats a verification campaign as a polyglot proof system composed of three mechanisms: cross-backend citation discharges a TLA+ obligation by citing an equivalent theorem in a structurally distinct kernel, with build- system-level drift-resistance enforced through kernel-level closure-assertion directives; cross-axis convergence composes per-obligation verdicts across independent verifiers into operational kernel-agreement gates; the AI layer is untrusted proof-search labour inside a trusted CI envelope. We validate the architecture on two production subsystems of the Mercury high-frequency-trading platform: a Raft consensus subsystem with full algorithmic scope and a financial-arithmetic invariant layer (balance accounting, automated-market-maker curve invariants, isolated-margin, lock-tracking settlement). The validation campaign reduced a 26-axiom Raft census to zero in 17 active hours of single-session wallclock
title_zh: 联邦形式化验证：面向生产系统的跨后端引用、跨轴收敛与AI编排的证明调度
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于生产级形式验证的联邦架构。该架构并未将所有验证义务强制纳入单一证明助手内核，而是将验证活动视为一个多语言证明系统，该系统由三种机制组成：交叉后端引用——通过引用结构不同内核中的等价定理来解除TLA+验证义务，并通过内核级闭包断言指令在构建系统层面实现抗漂移性；交叉轴收敛——将跨独立验证器的每个验证义务判决组合成可操作的内核一致性门；AI层——在可信的CI框架内作为不可信的证明搜索劳动力。我们基于Mercury高频交易平台的两个生产子系统对该架构进行了验证：一个涵盖完整算法范围的Raft共识子系统，以及一个金融算术不变量层（余额会计、自动做市商曲线不变量、独立保证金、锁仓结算）。该验证活动在单次会话的17小时挂钟时间内，将包含26个公理的Raft公理集缩减至零。

title: Mitigating Bias in Locally Constrained Decoding via Tractable Proposals
authors: Meihua Dang, Linxin Song, Honghua Zhang, Jieyu Zhao, Guy Van den Broeck, Stefano Ermon
abstract: Generations from large language models often fail to conform to desired constraints such as JSON schema. Existing locally constrained decoding (LCD) approaches enforce constraints by myopically masking out next tokens, resulting in biased sampling and degradation in performance. Recent work uses sequential Monte Carlo (SMC) methods to mitigate such biases, but designing effective proposal distributions or potential functions remains a key challenge. In this work, we propose a generic approach to construct proposals and potentials for SMC sampling from $p_{\mathrm{lm}}( \cdot \mid \mathrm{constraint})$. First, we show that constraints specified as finite automata can be tensorized for efficient execution on GPUs, which we use to construct globally constrained decoding (GCD) proposals. In addition, leveraging the fact that tensorized finite automata share the same circuit structure as hidden Markov models, we circuit-multiply them to obtain the probabilistic GCD (P-GCD) proposals encoding both logical and probabilistic information about the target distributions. We evaluate (P-)GCD on the tasks of function calling, keyword-based generation, and SQL generation. Experiments show that under the same SMC sampling setup, compared to LCD proposals, (P-)GCD converges faster to the target distribution with significantly fewer particles.
title_zh: 通过易处理的提议缓解局部约束解码中的偏差
abstract_zh: 大语言模型生成的输出往往难以满足预期的约束条件，例如JSON模式。现有的局部约束解码方法通过短视地屏蔽下一个词元来强制执行约束，这会导致采样偏差和性能下降。近期研究采用序列蒙特卡洛方法来缓解此类偏差，但设计有效的提议分布或势函数仍是一项关键挑战。本文提出一种通用方法，用于构建从 $p_{\mathrm{lm}}( \cdot \mid \mathrm{constraint})$ 进行SMC采样的提议分布与势函数。首先，我们证明指定为有限自动机的约束可以通过张量化在GPU上高效执行，由此构建全局约束解码提议。此外，利用张量化有限自动机与隐马尔可夫模型共享相同电路结构的特性，通过电路乘法得到概率型GCD提议——该提议同时编码了目标分布的逻辑信息与概率信息。我们在函数调用、关键词生成及SQL生成任务上评估了（P-）GCD方法。实验表明，在相同的SMC采样设置下，与LCD提议相比，（P-）GCD能以显著更少的粒子更快地收敛到目标分布。

title: Comparing ML-Specific and General Python Code Smells Across Project Characteristics
authors: Halimeh Agh, Betül Cimendag, Stefan Wagner
abstract: Machine learning systems consist of general-purpose code as well as machine-learning-specific code. While ML-specific code smells have been identified, their connection to project characteristics and their interaction with overall code quality are not well understood. Without this knowledge, quality assurance strategies remain one-size-fits-all, failing to account for the contextual factors that drive technical debt in ML systems. We present empirical evidence by examining how six project features (size, age, contributors, commit frequency, CI/CD adoption, and domain) relate to both ML-specific and general Python code quality in 279 open-source ML projects on GitHub. Using CodeSmile for ML code smells and Pylint for general Python smells, our results show: (1) ML code smells are 41-94 times less frequent than general Python smells; (2) commit frequency and domain are significantly associated with ML-specific quality, while project size, team size, age, and CI/CD adoption are not, challenging traditional views on technical debt; (3) general Python smells are not linked to any project characteristic, indicating systemic coding issues that are independent of project context; (4) domains that suffer most from ML-specific smells are not necessarily the same domains that suffer most from general Python smells, necessitating tailored quality strategies for each smell type. MLOps often involves configuration issues, Reinforcement Learning faces challenges with tensor manipulation, and Computer Vision encounters problems with GPU workflows. Overall, ML code quality depends on domain-specific practices and specialized CI/CD quality gates, as standard automation often overlooks domain-specific correctness problems.
title_zh: 跨项目特征比较机器学习特定和通用Python代码异味
abstract_zh: 机器学习系统由通用代码和机器学习专用代码组成。尽管已识别出机器学习代码坏味，但这些坏味与项目特征的关系及其对整体代码质量的影响尚未得到充分理解。缺乏这种认识，质量保证策略往往千篇一律，未能考虑驱动机器学习系统技术债务的上下文因素。我们通过检查六个项目特征（规模、寿命、贡献者数量、提交频率、CI/CD采用情况及领域）与279个GitHub上开源机器学习项目中机器学习专用代码和通用Python代码质量的关联，提供了实证依据。使用CodeSmile检测机器学习代码坏味、Pylint检测通用Python坏味，结果显示：（1）机器学习代码坏味的出现频率比通用Python坏味低41至94倍；（2）提交频率和领域与机器学习专用质量显著相关，而项目规模、团队规模、寿命和CI/CD采用则无关，这对技术债务的传统观点提出挑战；（3）通用Python坏味与任何项目特征均无关联，表明存在独立于项目上下文的系统性编码问题；（4）受机器学习专用坏味影响最严重的领域，未必是受通用Python坏味影响最严重的领域，因此需要针对每种坏味类型制定定制化的质量策略。MLOps常涉及配置问题，强化学习面临张量操作的挑战，计算机视觉则遭遇GPU工作流问题。总体而言，机器学习代码质量取决于领域特定实践和专门化的CI/CD质量门控，因为标准自动化往往忽略领域特定的正确性问题。

title: WorldCoder-Bench: Benchmarking Physically Grounded 3D World Synthesis
authors: Shuo Lu, Yinuo Xu, Kecheng Yu, Siru Jiang, Yongcan Yu, Yubin Wang, Haitao Yang, Yuxiang Zhang, Bin Wang, Ran He, Jian Liang
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly asked not only to write static interfaces, but to construct executable interactive worlds from natural language. Browser-native 3D, commonly built with Three.js, is a natural next frontier: generated programs must integrate assets, obey spatial and physical constraints, and keep user-facing controls synchronized with hidden runtime state. Existing web-generation benchmarks and evaluators, however, largely observe only pixels or DOM nodes, while the mechanics of a Three.js world unfold inside an opaque <canvas>. We introduce WorldCoder-Bench, a benchmark for autonomous, physically grounded 3D world synthesis. WorldCoder-Bench contains 2,026 expert-curated tasks across Simulation, Rendering, and Application scenarios, with optional .glb assets and hidden behavioral contracts. We further propose StateProbe, an execution-based protocol that probes generated programs in a sandboxed browser and verifies hidden, mutation-hardened contracts over runtime states and transitions. Beyond verification coverage, we report Return on Automation and Time Efficiency Multiplier to measure correctness-adjusted cost and time savings. Across nine frontier models, the best system reaches only 27.8% verification coverage on WorldCoder-Core and 19.9% on WorldCoder-Robust, with failures dominated by state-schema drift and broken interaction chains rather than missing scene elements. Utility metrics further show that cheap or fast models can still provide substantial value on easier domains. WorldCoder-Bench is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/WorldCoder-Bench/.
title_zh: WorldCoder-Bench：基于物理的三维世界合成基准测试
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）正日益被要求不仅编写静态界面，还要从自然语言构建可执行的交互世界。浏览器原生3D（通常使用Three.js构建）是一个自然的下一前沿领域：生成的程序必须集成资源、遵守空间和物理约束，并确保面向用户的控件与隐藏的运行时状态保持同步。然而，现有的网页生成基准和评估器大多仅观察像素或DOM节点，而Three.js世界的机制则在不透明的<canvas>元素内部展开。为此，我们推出了WorldCoder-Bench——一个用于自主、基于物理的3D世界合成的基准测试。WorldCoder-Bench包含2,026个专家精选的任务，涵盖模拟、渲染和应用场景，并提供可选的.glb资源和隐藏的行为契约。我们进一步提出了StateProbe，一种基于执行的协议，能够在沙盒浏览器中探测生成的程序，并验证关于运行时状态和转换的隐藏、经过突变加固的契约。除了验证覆盖率，我们还报告了自动化回报率和时间效率乘数，以衡量经过正确性调整的成本和时间节省。在九个前沿模型中，最佳系统在WorldCoder-Core上仅达到27.8%的验证覆盖率，在WorldCoder-Robust上为19.9%，失败的主要原因在于状态模式漂移和交互链断裂，而非缺少场景元素。效用指标进一步表明，廉价或快速的模型在较简单的领域仍能提供显著价值。WorldCoder-Bench可在https://anonymous.4open.science/r/WorldCoder-Bench/获取。

title: The Role of Ambiguity in Error Prediction via Uncertainty Quantification
authors: Ieva Raminta Staliūnaitė, James Bishop, Andreas Vlachos
abstract: The task of Error Prediction, namely predicting whether a model output is correct, is commonly tackled with Uncertainty Quantification (UQ). However, while uncertainty metrics capture when models lack knowledge or capacity to make a prediction, they also reflect aleatoric uncertainty, which is inherent in the model input and context. This paper presents a method for improving error prediction for Large Language Models (LLMs), by disentangling input ambiguity from UQ signal. We conduct experiments on the task of Question Answering (QA) with six UQ metrics and show that UQ metrics are more predictive of errors on unambiguous instances than on questions with multiple plausible answers. We use Gated Experts and Selective Prediction to incorporate gold and predicted ambiguity labels into the error prediction pipeline. We find that ambiguity information improves error prediction scores across model families, training and evaluation paradigms, datasets (including allegedly unambiguous ones), and sources of aleatoric uncertainty, yielding improvements of over 10 points of PRR for individual UQ metrics on standard datasets.
title_zh: 歧义在通过不确定性量化的错误预测中的作用
abstract_zh: 错误预测任务，即预测模型输出是否正确，通常通过不确定性量化（UQ）来解决。然而，虽然不确定性指标能够捕捉模型缺乏知识或能力进行预测的情况，但它们也反映了偶然不确定性，这种不确定性蕴含于模型输入和上下文中。本文提出了一种改进大语言模型（LLM）错误预测的方法，通过将输入歧义从UQ信号中分离出来。我们在问答（QA）任务上使用六种UQ指标进行了实验，结果表明，UQ指标在无歧义样本上的错误预测能力优于存在多个合理答案的问题。我们利用门控专家和选择性预测，将真实歧义标签和预测歧义标签融入错误预测流程。研究发现，歧义信息在模型家族、训练与评估范式、数据集（包括号称无歧义的数据集）以及偶然不确定性来源中均能提升错误预测得分，在标准数据集上，个别UQ指标的PRR提升超过10个百分点。

title: Bridging the Sim-to-Real Gap in Semiconductor Visual Program Synthesis via Input Binarization
authors: Yusuke Ohtsubo, Kota Dohi, Koichiro Yawata, Koki Takeshita, Tatsuya Sasaki
abstract: Precise parametric control over circuit geometry is essential for semiconductor inspection, yet obtaining sufficient real training data remains costly. Although generative models such as diffusion models and Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) can augment training data, they cannot guarantee the nanometer-scale geometric accuracy required for metrology tasks. We propose a visual program synthesis framework in which a Vision-Language Model (VLM) converts inspection images into editable Domain-Specific Language (DSL) code describing circuit geometries, enabling controlled generation of training data with exact parameter manipulation. Because the VLM is trained solely on synthetic DSL-rendered data, a domain gap arises when processing real Scanning Electron Microscope (SEM) images. We bridge this gap with an input binarization strategy that strips SEM-specific texture and noise, letting the model focus on geometric structure. On the MIIC dataset, binarized inputs improve the mean Dice coefficient from 0.4393 to 0.5256 over the raw-input baseline, demonstrating that simple texture abstraction substantially mitigates the sim-to-real gap.
title_zh: 通过输入二值化弥合半导体视觉程序合成中的仿真到现实差距
abstract_zh: 对电路几何结构进行精确的参数控制对于半导体检测至关重要，但获取足够的真实训练数据仍然成本高昂。尽管扩散模型和生成对抗网络（GAN）等生成模型可以扩充训练数据，但它们无法保证计量任务所需的纳米级几何精度。我们提出了一种视觉程序合成框架，其中视觉语言模型（VLM）将检测图像转换为可编辑的领域特定语言（DSL）代码，用于描述电路几何结构，从而能够通过精确的参数操作生成受控的训练数据。由于VLM仅基于合成的DSL渲染数据进行训练，因此在处理真实的扫描电子显微镜（SEM）图像时会出现领域差距。我们通过一种输入二值化策略来弥合这一差距，该策略剥离了SEM特有的纹理和噪声，使模型能够专注于几何结构。在MIIC数据集上，二值化输入将平均Dice系数从原始输入基线的0.4393提升至0.5256，表明简单的纹理抽象能够显著缓解模拟到现实的差距。

title: Defenses & Enablers For Skill Injection Attacks on Terminal Based Agents
authors: Yoshinari Fujinuma, Varun Gangal, Traian Rebedea, Makesh Narasimhan Sreedhar, Prasoon Varshney, Rebecca Qian, Anand Kannappan
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly rely on reusable skills i.e. documents describing task-specific procedures. However, this introduces a new attack surface for agents to manage. We study two complementary directions for this threat. First, we evaluate guardian-based defenses: an intermediary LLM agent that acts as a mediator for skill file access (dynamic guardian) or pre-rewrites these files at build time (static guardian). Across three LLM agent families, our guardians cut attack success rate (ASR) by well over half while preserving task utility. Second, we stress test them through attack reframing using four attacks that preserve the malicious instruction but change the phrasing. For non-guardian setup, the reframing pushes the ASR up to 81.4\%, but the dynamic guardian brings it down to 18.6\%, showing that real-time mediation is a robust defense.
title_zh: 针对基于终端的代理的技能注入攻击的防御与促成因素
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）代理越来越依赖于可复用的技能，即描述任务特定流程的文档。然而，这为代理引入了一个新的攻击面。我们针对这一威胁研究了两个互补方向。首先，我们评估了基于守护者的防御措施：一种作为技能文件访问中介的中间LLM代理（动态守护者），或在构建时预先重写这些文件的代理（静态守护者）。在三个LLM代理家族中，我们的守护者将攻击成功率（ASR）降低了一半以上，同时保持了任务效用。其次，我们通过四种攻击（这些攻击保留恶意指令但改变措辞）对它们进行了攻击重构的压力测试。对于非守护者设置，重构将ASR推高至81.4%，但动态守护者将其降至18.6%，表明实时中介是一种稳健的防御措施。

title: MPMWorlds: Material-Point-Method Simulations for Inferring and Extrapolating Physical Dynamics
authors: Žiga Kovačič, Kevin Ellis
abstract: To study the ability to infer physical dynamics from videos and extrapolate them forward in time, we assemble a dataset of 2D Material Point Method (MPM) physical simulations covering rich physical phenomena such as deformable objects, fluids, kinetic objects, and emitters. We study code generation and video diffusion approaches on this dataset, identifying their strengths and weaknesses by varying the amount of physically relevant side information. The code generation model, beyond giving a working demonstration of automatic synthesis of MPM simulations, reveals that such an approach struggles with inferring physical parameters from visual input, but relative to video diffusion, produces physically and temporally stable extrapolations forward in time, while the video diffusion model more strongly identifies geometric properties from visual input but produces physically implausible extrapolations.
title_zh: MPMWorlds: 基于物质点法的模拟用于推断和外推物理动力学
abstract_zh: 为了研究从视频中推断物理动态并随时间外推的能力，我们构建了一个包含二维物质点法（MPM）物理模拟的数据集，覆盖了诸如可变形物体、流体、动力学物体和发射器等丰富的物理现象。我们在此数据集上研究了代码生成和视频扩散方法，通过改变物理相关辅助信息的数量来识别它们的优缺点。代码生成模型除了能自动合成MPM模拟的工作演示外，还揭示了这种方法在从视觉输入中推断物理参数方面的困难，但相对于视频扩散，它能够生成在物理和时间上稳定的外推结果；而视频扩散模型虽然能更准确地从视觉输入中识别几何属性，但会产生物理上不合理的外推。

title: Trust-Calibrated Code Review: A Participatory Design Study of Review Workflows for LLM-Generated Multi-File Changes
authors: Lo Gullstrand Heander, Agnia Sergeyuk, Ilya Zakharov, Emma Söderberg, Nikita Mukhortov
abstract: Background: Developers increasingly review multi-file code changes generated by LLM-based agents, yet no validated end-to-end workflow or IDE tooling design exists for this scenario. Aims: We investigate (RQ1) the challenges developers face when reviewing LLM-generated multi-file changes and (RQ2) how developers envision effective workflows for this task. Method: In collaboration with JetBrains, we conducted a participatory design study structured using the double-diamond design process with Discover, Define, Develop, and Deliver phases. Industry practitioners participated in the Discover phase (N=17); seven of these returned for the Develop phase. The Define phase was an author-led synthesis. The Deliver phase produced a conceptual design and a high-fidelity semi-interactive prototype evaluated through a follow-up survey with N=43 practitioners. Results: Participants identified trust-calibration as the central challenge. The study yielded a three-level review workflow (overview, file-analysis, code snippet review) supported by seven design constructs (chunk, risk-per-line, risk-per-file, judge, walk-through, zooming in/out, and security cage). In the validation survey, all three workflow levels scored above the neutral midpoint (means 3.50--3.91 on a five-point scale). Of the respondents, 63% expected reduced overall review effort, and 52% reduced trust-assessment effort, relative to their current tools. These findings suggest that the design constructs indicate a positive direction for future tool development. Conclusions: Reviewing LLM-generated multi-file changes is a trust-calibration problem rather than a diffing problem. The three-level workflow and the seven constructs we report give tool designers a conceptual framework for building AI-ready code review tools that surface risk and confidence signals at the granularity at which developers allocate attention.
title_zh: 信任校准的代码审查：一项关于LLM生成的多文件更改的审查工作流程的参与式设计研究
abstract_zh: 背景：开发者越来越多地审查由基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体生成的跨多文件代码变更，但目前尚无针对该场景的经过验证的端到端工作流或集成开发环境（IDE）工具设计。目标：我们旨在探究（RQ1）开发者在审查LLM生成的多文件变更时面临的挑战，以及（RQ2）开发者如何构想完成该任务的有效工作流。方法：与JetBrains合作，我们采用双钻石设计流程，通过发现、定义、开发和交付四个阶段开展参与式设计研究。行业从业者参与了发现阶段（N=17），其中7人返回参与开发阶段。定义阶段由作者主导完成综合归纳。交付阶段产出概念设计及高保真半交互式原型，并通过后续问卷（N=43名从业者）进行评估。结果：参与者指出信任校准是核心挑战。研究提炼出三级审查工作流（概览、文件分析、代码片段审查），并辅以七项设计构件（变更块、逐行风险、逐文件风险、评估者、逐步审查、缩放切换、安全笼）。验证问卷中，三级工作流得分均高于中性中点（5分量表中均值3.50-3.91）。63%的受访者预期相比现有工具将减少整体审查工作量，52%预期降低信任评估工作量。这些发现表明设计构件为未来工具开发提供了积极方向。结论：审查LLM生成的多文件变更本质上是信任校准问题，而非差异比较问题。我们所报告的三级工作流和七项构件为工具设计者提供了概念框架，使其能够构建面向AI的代码审查工具，在开发者注意力分配的粒度上呈现风险与置信信号。

title: HeteroSTA3D: A CPU-GPU Heterogeneous Static Timing Analysis Engine for 3D ICs
authors: Yuhao Ji, Zizheng Guo, Zuodong Zhang, Yibo Lin, Bei Yu
publish: 2026 Conference of Science and technology of Integrated Circuits (CSTIC)
abstract: Three-dimensional integrated circuits (3D ICs) based on hybrid bonding have emerged as a key technology for sustaining performance scaling beyond the limits of conventional transistor shrinkage. However, the timing analysis of 3D ICs introduces challenges absent in two-dimensional (2D) designs, including combinatorial explosion in multi-corner analysis across heterogeneous technology nodes, inter-die parasitic modeling for hybrid bonding interconnects, and cross-die critical path extraction through a unified timing graph. No existing static timing analysis (STA) engine addresses these challenges natively. In this paper, we present HeteroSTA3D, the first CPU-GPU heterogeneous STA engine for 3D ICs. Targeting hybrid-bonding-based face-to-face two-die integration, HeteroSTA3D supports dual-die Liberty library management with independent process nodes, configurable bonding terminal parasitic modeling, multi-corner analysis across per-die PVT combinations, and end-to-end GPU-accelerated cross-die critical path search. HeteroSTA3D is released as an embeddable shared library with both industry-standard file formats and a zero-overhead flattened heterogeneous API for seamless integration into GPU-accelerated EDA flows. Experimental results show that GPU acceleration reduces runtime compared to CPU-only execution. A case study integrating HeteroSTA3D into a timing-driven 3D placement flow further demonstrates its effectiveness, achieving improved timing with affordable runtime overhead. HeteroSTA3D is freely available for academic use at https://heterosta3d.pkueda.org.cn/.
title_zh: HeteroSTA3D: 一种面向三维集成电路的CPU-GPU异构静态时序分析引擎
abstract_zh: 基于混合键合的三维集成电路（3D IC）已成为超越传统晶体管缩减极限、维持性能 scaling 的关键技术。然而，3D IC 的时序分析引入了二维（2D）设计中不存在的挑战，包括异构技术节点间多角分析的组合爆炸、混合键合互连的跨芯片寄生参数建模，以及通过统一时序图提取跨芯片关键路径。目前尚无静态时序分析（STA）引擎原生解决这些问题。本文提出 HeteroSTA3D，这是首个用于 3D IC 的 CPU-GPU 异构 STA 引擎。针对基于混合键合的面对面双芯片集成，HeteroSTA3D 支持具有独立工艺节点的双芯片 Liberty 库管理、可配置的键合终端寄生参数建模、各芯片 PVT 组合下的多角分析，以及端到端 GPU 加速的跨芯片关键路径搜索。HeteroSTA3D 以可嵌入共享库形式发布，支持行业标准文件格式和零开销扁平化异构 API，便于无缝集成到 GPU 加速的 EDA 流程中。实验结果表明，与纯 CPU 执行相比，GPU 加速缩短了运行时间。将 HeteroSTA3D 集成到时序驱动 3D 布局流程的案例研究进一步证明了其有效性，在可接受的运行时开销下实现了时序改进。HeteroSTA3D 免费提供给学术界使用，网址为 https://heterosta3d.pkueda.org.cn/。

title: AI-based Tools Test Cases Generation and Software Correctness: A Critical Review
authors: Sara Abu Dabaa’t, MohammadNoor Injadat, Ahmad Samhan
publish: 2025 26th International Arab Conference on Information Technology (ACIT)
abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is now increasingly transforming software quality assurance, and test case generation is among its most notable use cases. Here, this study provides a review of AI-based techniques and tools facilitating automated test case generation, evidencing their effectiveness in verifying software correctness. From over fifty of the latest academic and industrial contributions published from 2020 to 2025, machine learning models, natural language processing approaches, symbolic execution techniques, and generative AI models have been reviewed. The review identifies key accomplishments of AI approaches, including improvements in test coverage of up to 60%, correction of up to 30% of post-deployment defects, and significant testing cycle reduction. However, challenges persist in aspects of data quality, model interpretability, deployment in continuous development pipelines, and the balancing of automation and manual intervention. Due to these gaps, the study introduces a comparative overview of testing strategies with a focus on AI and reveal the demand for empirical validation, standardized tests, and hybrid solutions that combine AI automation and expert knowledge. The findings demonstrate the revolutionary effect of AI on current software testing and reveal important milestones to be attained for its fruitful use in research and practice.
title_zh: 基于AI工具的测试用例生成与软件正确性：批判性综述
abstract_zh: 人工智能正日益改变软件质量保障领域，而测试用例生成是其最显著的应用场景之一。本研究对基于AI的自动化测试用例生成技术与工具进行了综述，证实其在验证软件正确性方面的有效性。通过梳理2020至2025年间发表的50余项最新学术与工业成果，我们评估了机器学习模型、自然语言处理方法、符号执行技术以及生成式AI模型。综述指出AI方法的关键成就包括：测试覆盖率提升高达60%，可纠正多达30%的部署后缺陷，并显著缩短测试周期。然而，在数据质量、模型可解释性、持续开发流水线中的部署能力以及自动化与人工干预的平衡等方面仍存在挑战。针对这些不足，本研究引入了以AI为重点的测试策略比较概览，并揭示了对经验验证、标准化测试以及融合AI自动化与专家知识的混合解决方案的需求。研究结果展示了AI对当前软件测试的革命性影响，并指出了其在研究与实践中有效应用所需实现的关键里程碑。

title: LLM-Seeded Genetic Improvement: Hierarchical AST Evolution with Multi-Level Donor-Code Transplants
authors: Michael Schladt, John C. Gallagher
abstract: Automated software transformation remains a key challenge in search-based software engineering, particularly when targeting high-level behavioral changes. We present a novel genetic improvement (GI) framework that evolves program source code using a novel hierarchical abstract syntax tree (AST) representation and a suite of specialized genetic operators. Our approach supports multilevel structural edits, including insertion, deletion, and replacement of AST subtrees, and enables code transplants from a pool of LLM-generated donor programs. Donor code is generated automatically by prompting a large language model (LLM) to solve the target task in diverse ways, then extracting and preserving every syntactically valid AST node from its outputs. Candidate variants are evaluated using a multi-stage fitness function that prioritizes compatibility, functional correctness, and behavioral alignment with a specified target. As a proof-of-concept, we evolve a breadth-first search implementation into a depth-first search solely through automated AST-based edits. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach efficiently discovers minimal and correct transformations, underscoring the importance of both representation and operator design in automated software evolution. Our results broaden GI’s capabilities toward domain-agnostic, behavior-changing code evolution. This work lays a foundation for more scalable automated software adaptation and repair techniques.
title_zh: 大语言模型种子驱动的遗传改进：基于多层捐赠代码移植的分层抽象语法树演化
abstract_zh: 自动化软件转换仍然是基于搜索的软件工程中的关键挑战，特别是在针对高层行为变更时。我们提出了一种新颖的遗传改进（GI）框架，该框架使用一种新颖的层次化抽象语法树（AST）表示和一套专门的遗传算子来演化程序源代码。我们的方法支持多级结构编辑，包括AST子树的插入、删除和替换，并能从大型语言模型（LLM）生成的供体程序池中进行代码移植。供体代码通过提示大语言模型以多种方式解决目标任务自动生成，然后从其输出中提取并保留每个语法有效的AST节点。候选变体通过一个多阶段适应度函数进行评估，该函数优先考虑兼容性、功能正确性以及与指定目标的行为对齐。作为概念验证，我们仅通过基于AST的自动编辑将广度优先搜索实现演化为深度优先搜索。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够高效发现最小且正确的转换，突出了表示和算子设计在自动化软件演化中的重要性。我们的结果将GI的能力扩展到与领域无关、改变行为的代码演化。这项工作为更可扩展的自动化软件适应和修复技术奠定了基础。

title: A Parallelism-Driven, Area-Aware Technology Mapping Framework for Memristive Logic-in-Memory
authors: Ikkyum Kim, Minhong Kim, Heechun Park
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Data-centric applications continue to be limited by the memory wall. Logic-in-Memory (LiM) architectures based on non-volatile memories (NVMs), such as memristors, offer a promising solution by enabling in-memory computation and eliminating costly data movement. While several approaches leveraging memristor-aided logic (MAGIC) operations have been proposed, many fail to fully exploit the parallelism and spatial efficiency of memristor crossbars, especially under physical design constraints. In this paper, we propose a parallelism-driven, area-aware look-up table (LUT)-based mapping framework of arbitrary logic circuits into a memristor crossbar using MAGIC operations. We present a crossbar-aware floorplanning strategy that leverages topological LUT information to enable two-directional parallel computation (i.e., HNOR and VNOR), thereby maximizing computational LUTs with minimal execution cycles. We formulate an integer linear programming (ILP) approach to define the placement of each LUT and its fanin locations, improving routability while preserving parallelism. Moreover, we introduce our novel A∗-search-based fan-in routing method with Hanan grid that fully utilizes the aligned fanins and intermediate results. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves maximum parallelism and crossbar utilization, thereby reducing cycle counts by 19.6% and ensuring that all benchmarks map successfully under strict area constraints. We also confirm the scalability and practical applicability of the proposed framework for large-scale logic mapping in memristor-based LiM systems.
title_zh: 一种面向忆阻存内逻辑的并行驱动、面积感知技术映射框架
abstract_zh: 数据密集型应用持续受到内存墙的限制。基于非易失性存储器（如忆阻器）的内存内逻辑（LiM）架构通过实现内存内计算并消除高成本的数据搬运，提供了一种有前景的解决方案。尽管已有多种利用忆阻器辅助逻辑（MAGIC）操作的方法被提出，但许多方法未能充分利用忆阻器交叉阵列的并行性和空间效率，尤其是在物理设计约束下。本文提出了一种并行性驱动、面积感知的基于查找表（LUT）的映射框架，利用MAGIC操作将任意逻辑电路映射到忆阻器交叉阵列中。我们提出了一种交叉阵列感知的布局规划策略，利用拓扑LUT信息实现双向并行计算（即HNOR和VNOR），从而以最少的执行周期最大化计算LUT的数量。我们采用整数线性规划（ILP）方法定义每个LUT及其扇入位置的布局，在保持并行性的同时提高可布线性。此外，我们引入了基于A*搜索的扇入路由方法及Hanan网格，充分利用对齐的扇入和中间结果。实验结果表明，所提出的框架实现了最大并行性和交叉阵列利用率，从而将周期数减少了19.6%，并确保所有基准测试在严格的面积约束下成功映射。我们还确认了所提框架在基于忆阻器的LiM系统中用于大规模逻辑映射的可扩展性和实际适用性。

title: Prompt-as-Heuristic: A Hyperheuristic Framework for Meta-Reasoning in Large Language Models
authors: Kassem Danach, Samir Haddad, Jinane Sayah, Khouloud Eledlebi, Joseph Merhej, Kallab Chadi
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Systems, and Emerging Technologies (ICAISET)
abstract: Prompt engineering has emerged as a dominant paradigm for controlling the reasoning behavior of large language models (LLMs). However, existing approaches rely on static, manually designed prompts that lack adaptability, theoretical grounding, and robustness under task distribution shift. In this paper, we introduce the Prompt-as-Heuristic paradigm, in which prompts are formalized as reasoning heuristics and controlled by a higher-level hyperheuristic mechanism. The proposed framework learns to select, adapt, and evolve prompt heuristics online based on task context, solution quality, and reasoning cost. We formulate prompt selection as a meta-reasoning optimization problem and propose a general learning architecture compatible with bandit-based, evolutionary, and reinforcement learning hyperheuristics. Extensive experiments across mathematical reasoning, program synthesis, abstraction tasks, and combinatorial optimization benchmarks demonstrate that adaptive prompt hyperheuristics consistently outperform static prompting strategies while achieving superior reasoning efficiency and generalization.
title_zh: 提示即启发：大型语言模型中元推理的超启发式框架
abstract_zh: 提示工程已成为控制大型语言模型（LLMs）推理行为的主导范式。然而，现有方法依赖于静态、手动设计的提示，缺乏适应性、理论依据以及在任务分布偏移下的鲁棒性。本文提出“提示即启发式”（Prompt-as-Heuristic）范式，将提示形式化为推理启发式，并由更高层次的超启发式机制进行控制。所提出的框架能够根据任务上下文、解质量和推理成本，在线学习如何选择、适应和演化提示启发式。我们将提示选择形式化为元推理优化问题，并提出一种通用的学习架构，该架构兼容基于赌博机算法、进化算法和强化学习的超启发式方法。在数学推理、程序合成、抽象任务以及组合优化基准上进行的广泛实验表明，自适应提示超启发式方法持续优于静态提示策略，同时实现了更优的推理效率和泛化能力。

title: Asm2Src-LLMEval: A GenAI Pipeline for Multi-Metric Assessment of LLMs in Program Translation and Analysis
authors: Parisa Hamedi, Hamed Jelodar, Samita Bai, Mohammad Meymani, Roozbeh Razavi-Far, Ali Ghorbani
abstract: Assembly-to-source code translation is a critical task in reverse engineering, cybersecurity, and software maintenance, yet systematic benchmarks for evaluating large language models on this problem remain scarce. In this work, we present the first comprehensive evaluation of five state-of-the-art large language models on assembly-to-source translation. We assess model performance using a diverse set of metrics capturing lexical similarity (BLEU, ROUGE, and METEOR), semantic alignment (BERTScore), fluency (Perplexity), and efficiency (time prediction). Our results reveal clear trade-offs: while certain models excel in text similarity metrics, others demonstrate lower perplexity or faster inference times. We further provide qualitative analyses of typical model successes and failure cases, highlighting challenges such as control flow recovery and identifier reconstruction. Taken together, our benchmark offers actionable insights into the strengths and limitations of current large language models for program translation, establishing a foundation for future research in combining accuracy with efficiency for real-world applications..
title_zh: Asm2Src-LLMEval：一种用于程序翻译与分析中LLMs多指标评估的GenAI流水线
abstract_zh: 汇编到源代码的翻译是逆向工程、网络安全和软件维护中的关键任务，然而针对评估大语言模型在此问题上的系统性基准仍然稀缺。本研究首次对五种最先进的大语言模型在汇编到源代码翻译任务上进行了全面评估。我们采用一组多样化的指标来评估模型性能，涵盖词汇相似性（BLEU、ROUGE和METEOR）、语义对齐（BERTScore）、流畅性（困惑度）以及效率（预测时间）。我们的结果揭示了明确的权衡关系：某些模型在文本相似性指标上表现优异，而另一些模型则展现出更低的困惑度或更快的推理时间。我们进一步提供了典型模型成功与失败案例的定性分析，凸显了诸如控制流恢复和标识符重建等挑战。总体而言，我们的基准测试为当前大语言模型在程序翻译方面的优势与局限性提供了可操作的见解，为未来在真实应用中融合准确性与效率的研究奠定了基础。

title: Prompt Optimization through Reinforcement Learning for Generative Language Model Code Synthesis in Multi-Robot Systems
authors: Kaushik Kannan, Jungyun Bae
abstract: In multi-robot systems (MRS) operating across various applications, real-time task allocation and path planning pose significant challenges, often requiring extensive human intervention under extreme time constraints. This paper introduces a novel framework that leverages Reinforcement Learning (RL) to automate and optimize the code generation process for MRS. Our approach trains an RL agent to dynamically generate optimized prompts for a Large Language Model (LLM). By refining prompt structures, templates, and parameters, the RL agent guides the LLM to produce efficient, feasible, and directly executable code for complex task allocation and path-planning problems. We demonstrate that the generated solutions are both complete and high-performing. The proposed method is evaluated on a sample case of search-and-rescue scenarios, using GPT-4.1 as the LLM, and demonstrates significant performance improvements over previous work that used manual prompt optimization for similar applications. This work represents a significant step towards autonomous multi-robot coordination in time-critical dynamic environments, reducing human workload and improving mission efficacy.
title_zh: 用于多机器人系统中生成式语言模型代码合成的强化学习提示优化
abstract_zh: 在各类应用场景中运行的多机器人系统（MRS）面临着实时任务分配与路径规划的重大挑战，往往需要在极端时间约束下依赖大量人工干预。本文提出了一种新型框架，利用强化学习（RL）来自动优化MRS的代码生成过程。我们的方法训练一个RL智能体，动态地为大语言模型（LLM）生成优化的提示词。通过优化提示结构、模板和参数，RL智能体引导LLM生成高效、可行且可直接执行的代码，以解决复杂的任务分配与路径规划问题。我们证明生成的解决方案既完整又高性能。该方法以GPT-4.1作为LLM，在搜索救援场景的示例案例中进行了评估，并显示出相比先前采用手动提示优化类似应用的工作具有显著的性能提升。这项工作标志着在时间紧迫的动态环境中朝向自主多机器人协调迈出了重要一步，能够减轻人工负担并提高任务效能。

title: Policy-Driven Shift-Left Security for Hybrid OpenShift CI/CD Pipelines
authors: Nilesh Jaiswal
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Systems, and Emerging Technologies (ICAISET)
abstract: Enterprise adoption of hybrid cloud platforms such as Red Hat OpenShift has increased the complexity of securing containerized workloads across heterogeneous infrastructure. Traditional CI/CD pipelines defer vulnerability detection and policy validation to late stages, allowing insecure artifacts to propagate toward production. This paper presents a policy-driven shift-left security framework that integrates three controls into the pre-deployment stage of hybrid OpenShift CI/CD pipelines: container image vulnerability scanning using Trivy, Kubernetes deployment policy enforcement using Open Policy Agent (OPA) with eight Rego-based denial rules, and governance tag validation against a four-label compliance schema. We evaluate the framework through a controlled experiment comparing a baseline pipeline (no security checks) against the shift-left pipeline across 50 builds deployed to a Kubernetes namespace, comprising 35 compliant, 8 vulnerable, 5 policy-violating, and 2 governance-noncompliant configurations. The baseline pipeline deploys all 50 builds without checks, while the shift-left pipeline blocks all 15 insecure builds (100% detection rate) with zero false positives. The shift-left pipeline introduces a mean overhead of 28.3 seconds per build, with container image scanning accounting for 82.2% of the added time. Results demonstrate that early-stage integration of layered security controls eliminates insecure deployments in hybrid OpenShift environments without disrupting compliant workloads.
title_zh: 面向混合OpenShift CI/CD流水线的策略驱动左移安全
abstract_zh: 企业采用红帽 OpenShift 等混合云平台，增加了跨异构基础设施保护容器化工作负载的复杂性。传统 CI/CD 流水线将漏洞检测和策略验证推迟到后期阶段，导致不安全制品向生产环境扩散。本文提出了一种策略驱动的左移安全框架，将三种控制措施集成到混合 OpenShift CI/CD 流水线的部署前阶段：使用 Trivy 进行容器镜像漏洞扫描、使用 Open Policy Agent（OPA）及八个基于 Rego 的拒绝规则进行 Kubernetes 部署策略执行，以及根据四标签合规模式进行治理标签验证。我们通过一个受控实验评估该框架，将基线流水线（无安全检查）与左移流水线进行对比，共进行 50 个构建并部署到一个 Kubernetes 命名空间，其中包括 35 个合规配置、8 个存在漏洞的配置、5 个违反策略的配置和 2 个不符合治理要求的配置。基线流水线部署了全部 50 个构建而未作检查，而左移流水线阻止了全部 15 个不安全构建（检测率 100%），且零误报。左移流水线每个构建的平均开销为 28.3 秒，其中容器镜像扫描占增加时间的 82.2%。结果表明，早期集成分层安全控制可在混合 OpenShift 环境中消除不安全部署，同时不影响合规工作负载。

title: OGD4All: A Framework for Accessible Interaction with Geospatial Open Government Data Based on Large Language Models
authors: Michael Siebenmann, Javier Argota Sánchez-Vaquerizo, Stefan Arisona, Krystian Samp, Luis Gisler, Dirk Helbing
abstract: We present OGD4All, a transparent, auditable, and reproducible framework based on Large Language Models (LLMs) to enhance citizens’ interaction with geospatial Open Government Data (OGD). The system combines semantic data retrieval, agentic reasoning for iterative code generation, and secure sandboxed execution that produces verifiable multimodal outputs. Evaluated on a 199-question benchmark covering both factual and unanswerable questions, across 430 City-of-Zurich datasets and 11 LLMs, OGD4All reaches 98% analytical correctness and 94% recall while reliably rejecting questions unsupported by available data, which minimizes hallucination risks. Statistical robustness tests, as well as expert feedback, show reliability and social relevance. The proposed approach shows how LLMs can provide explainable, multimodal access to public data, advancing trustworthy AI for open governance.
title_zh: OGD4All：基于大语言模型的地理空间开放政府数据无障碍交互框架
abstract_zh: 我们提出了OGD4All——一个基于大语言模型（LLM）的透明、可审计且可复现的框架，旨在增强市民与地理空间开放政府数据（OGD）的交互。该系统整合了语义数据检索、用于迭代代码生成的智能推理以及安全的沙盒执行环境，可生成可验证的多模态输出。在涵盖事实性和不可回答性问题的199道题基准测试中，使用430个苏黎世市数据集和11种大语言模型进行评测，OGD4All的分析正确率达到98%，召回率高达94%，并能可靠地拒绝现有数据不支持的问题，从而将幻觉风险降至最低。统计稳健性测试和专家反馈均证明了其可靠性和社会相关性。该方法展示了如何利用大语言模型为公共数据提供可解释的多模态访问，从而推动开放治理中可信人工智能的发展。

title: Vision-Based Transformer Model for Fast Simulation of Advanced Packaging Structure
authors: Yifan Wang, Xingchen Li, Yiliang Guo, Madhavan Swaminathan
publish: IEEE Journal on Multiscale and Multiphysics Computational Techniques
abstract: Accurate electromagnetic (EM) modeling of electronic package structures is critical for signal and power integrity analysis, yet full-wave simulations on fine meshes are often computationally expensive. Deep learning and neural network models have recently attracted considerable attention as alternative solutions. However, with the continuous expansion of the design space in advanced packaging, conventional surrogate architectures such as FCNNs, CNNs, and RNNs start to exhibit limitations in scalability. Therefore, in this paper, we propose two vision-based transformer models that eliminate the need for design parameters and leverage self-attention mechanism for efficient package-level EM and multi-physics simulation. The first framework employs a Vision Transformer (ViT) to directly predict frequency-domain responses (S-parameters) from structural images of the package. By capturing global spatial dependencies through self-attention, the ViT-based model achieves high accuracy while significantly reducing computational cost compared to conventional EM solvers. The second framework introduces a transformer-based super-resolution neural network designed for multiphysics co-simulation scenarios. Specifically, a physical structure is simulated with a coarse mesh using an EM solver to provide power input to the thermal solver, which subsequently generates low-resolution temperature profile images. The super-resolution neural network then refines these results to produce high-resolution temperature distributions, akin to those obtained through numerical simulations with a fine mesh. Various numerical examples are simulated to validate the capability and improvement of the proposed method.
title_zh: 基于视觉的Transformer模型用于先进封装结构的快速仿真
abstract_zh: 对电子封装结构进行精确的电磁建模对于信号和电源完整性分析至关重要，然而在精细网格上进行全波仿真通常计算成本高昂。近年来，深度学习和神经网络模型作为替代方案受到了广泛关注。然而，随着先进封装中设计空间的持续扩展，FCNN、CNN和RNN等传统代理架构在可扩展性方面开始显现局限性。因此，本文提出了两种基于视觉的Transformer模型，这些模型无需依赖设计参数，并利用自注意力机制实现高效的封装级电磁及多物理场仿真。第一个框架采用视觉Transformer（ViT）直接从封装结构图像中预测频域响应（S参数）。通过自注意力机制捕获全局空间依赖关系，基于ViT的模型在显著降低计算成本的同时实现了高精度。第二个框架引入了一种基于Transformer的超分辨率神经网络，专为多物理场协同仿真场景设计。具体来说，首先使用电磁求解器对物理结构进行粗网格仿真，为热求解器提供功率输入，随后生成低分辨率温度分布图像。超分辨率神经网络进一步优化这些结果，生成与通过精细网格数值仿真所得结果相当的高分辨率温度分布。通过多个数值实例验证了所提出方法的能力与改进效果。

title: A Performance-Driven Digital Computing-in-Memory Compiler with LLM Assisted Analysis Method
authors: Wangxi Cai, Xintao Chen, Jingyang Chen, Zuochang Ye, Zhiping Yu, Xiaolei Zhu
publish: 2026 Conference of Science and technology of Integrated Circuits (CSTIC)
abstract: The growing demand for energy-efficient computing has positioned SRAM-based Digital Computing-in-Memory (DCIM) as a promising solution for AI workloads. However, the design of DCIM macros remains challenging due to manual optimization efforts and the complexity of achieving optimal performance under varying constraints. To address this, we present a performance-driven DCIM compiler with an LLM-assisted analysis method. Our framework integrates a Large Language Model (LLM) to interpret natural language specifications and automate design space exploration, enabling performance-aware circuit generation. The compiler features a modular architecture allowing deep circuit-level customization and supports cross-process migration from architecture to layout. Experimental results demonstrate automated generation of DCIM macros in TSMC 65nm and SMIC 55nm processes, validating the effectiveness of our approach in achieving performance-optimized designs while significantly reducing design cycle time.
title_zh: 一种采用LLM辅助分析方法的性能驱动数字存内计算编译器
abstract_zh: 对能效计算需求的不断增长，使基于SRAM的数字存内计算（DCIM）成为人工智能工作负载的一种有前景的解决方案。然而，由于手动优化工作量大，且在不同约束条件下实现最优性能的复杂性高，DCIM宏单元的设计仍然具有挑战性。针对这一问题，我们提出了一种性能驱动的DCIM编译器，并辅以大语言模型（LLM）辅助分析方法。该框架集成大语言模型，能够解析自然语言规格说明并自动探索设计空间，从而生成性能感知的电路。编译器采用模块化架构，支持深层次的电路级定制，并具备从架构到版图的跨工艺迁移能力。实验结果表明，该方法能够在台积电65纳米和中芯国际55纳米工艺下自动生成DCIM宏单元，验证了其在实现性能优化设计的同时显著缩短设计周期的有效性。

title: Enabling High-Throughput Packetized Scan: User Convenience with V93000 EXA Scale Hardware and Smartest 8 SSN Library Under The SSN DFT Paradigm
authors: Kevin Yan, Litao Geng, Junna Zhong
publish: 2026 Conference of Science and technology of Integrated Circuits (CSTIC)
abstract: Advanced nodes, very large digital content, and multi-die packaging drive exponential SCAN data growth. At the same time, first-package access limits, probe resource constraints, and manufacturing cost pressures make traditional "many pins, low speed" scan increasingly impractical. Tessent Streaming Scan Network (SSN) provides a packetized scan architecture over a narrow-and-fast high-speed bus, decoupling the external tester rate from the internal core shift speed. By utilizing SSN, it is possible to simultaneously test any number of cores with fewer chip-level pins, while also reducing test time and test data volume. This paper shows how Advantest V93000 EXA Scale hardware together with the SmarTest 8 SSN library deliver high throughput and user convenience without altering the established STIL→ATE and STDF→diagnosis dataflow. We summarize execution modes, hardware capabilities, performance observations, and deployment guidance.
title_zh: 实现高吞吐量分组扫描：在SSN DFT范式下利用V93000 EXA规模硬件和Smartest 8 SSN库带来的用户便利性
abstract_zh: 先进节点、超大规模数字内容以及多芯粒封装推动SCAN数据呈指数级增长。与此同时，首次封装接触限制、探针资源约束以及制造成本压力，使得传统的“多引脚、低速”扫描愈发不切实际。Tessent流式扫描网络（SSN）通过窄带高速总线提供数据包化扫描架构，将外部测试仪速率与内部内核移位速度解耦。利用SSN，可以使用更少的芯片级引脚同时测试任意数量的内核，同时减少测试时间和测试数据量。本文展示了爱德万V93000 EXA Scale硬件与SmarTest 8 SSN库如何在不改变既有的STIL→ATE和STDF→诊断数据流的前提下，实现高吞吐量和用户便利性。我们总结了执行模式、硬件能力、性能观察结果以及部署指导。

title: LLM-Assisted Software Development in Aerospace Engineering Education: A Structured Workflow
authors: Raed Kafafy, Mohamed Okasha, Ossama Abdelkhalik
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Systems, and Emerging Technologies (ICAISET)
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being applied to software development tasks; however, their structured integration into aerospace engineering workflows remains insufficiently documented. This paper presents a structured workflow for LLM-assisted software development in aerospace engineering education, emphasizing problem decomposition, modular prompt design, iterative validation, and human-in-the-loop verification.The proposed methodology is demonstrated through a case study involving the development of a web-based visualization tool for orbital mechanics instruction. Rather than focusing on the software architecture itself, the study analyzes the interaction between domain expertise and AI-generated code, identifies common error categories, and evaluates the role of structured prompting in improving reliability and development efficiency. The results highlight both the potential and limitations of LLM-assisted engineering, underscoring the necessity of expert validation in physics-based applications. The presented workflow provides a practical framework for integrating large language models into aerospace software development and educational tool prototyping.
title_zh: 航空航天工程教育中基于大语言模型的软件开发：一种结构化工作流
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型越来越多地被应用于软件开发任务，然而其在航空航天工程工作流中的结构化整合仍缺乏充分记录。本文提出了一种用于航空航天工程教育中大型语言模型辅助软件开发的系统化方法，强调问题分解、模块化提示设计、迭代验证以及人在回路的验证流程。通过一个涉及轨道力学教学用网络可视化工具开发的案例研究，对该方法进行了论证。该研究并未聚焦于软件架构本身，而是分析了领域专业知识与人工智能生成代码之间的交互作用，识别了常见错误类别，并评估了结构化提示在提升可靠性和开发效率方面的作用。研究结果既揭示了大型语言模型辅助工程的潜力，也指出了其局限性，强调了在基于物理的应用中专家验证的必要性。所提出的工作流为将大型语言模型整合到航空航天软件开发及教育工具原型设计中提供了一个实用框架。

title: A Deep Learning-Based Surrogate Model for LOCOS Etch Process TCAD Simulation Using a Conditional Variational Autoencoder
authors: Yan Pan, Yiting Ye, Boying Meng, Kai Xu
publish: 2026 Conference of Science and technology of Integrated Circuits (CSTIC)
abstract: Drain extended MOS (DEMOS) devices are critical components in power management and amplifier circuits, whose performance hinges on the breakdown voltage (BV). Traditional BV characterization via TCAD simulation or wafer fabrication is accurate but costly and slow. We overcome this limitation with a hybrid Deep Neural Network (DNN) and Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) framework, achieving 96% accuracy on simulation data and high performance on measured data, drastically cutting development time and cost.
title_zh: 基于深度学习的替代模型：使用条件变分自编码器进行LOCOS刻蚀工艺TCAD模拟
abstract_zh: 漏极扩展MOS（DEMOS）器件是电源管理和放大器电路中的关键元件，其性能取决于击穿电压（BV）。传统的BV表征方法通过TCAD仿真或晶圆制造实现，虽然准确但成本高且速度慢。我们通过混合深度神经网络（DNN）与卷积神经网络（CNN）框架克服了这一局限，在仿真数据上实现了96%的准确率，并在实测数据上表现优异，从而大幅缩短了开发时间和成本。

title: Safeguarding Scientific Algorithms: A Framework for Detecting Algorithmic Plagiarism in Metaheuristic Research
authors: Colin L. Heffern, Halbert N. Nguyen, Walter H. Cook, Gunni U. Kamran, Giovanna Camacho, Matthew L. Bolton
publish: 2026 Systems and Information Engineering Design Symposium (SIEDS)
abstract: Academic misconduct increasingly occurs through algorithmic duplication, in which existing, lightly modified methods are presented as novel. This problem is especially relevant in metaheuristic optimization, a field that has experienced rapid growth along with concerns about derivative algorithms. This paper presents an AI-driven framework for detecting algorithmic plagiarism in metaheuristic research by comparing the computational logic of algorithms rather than their surface-level similarity. The proposed pipeline extracts pseudocode from academic PDFs, canonicalizes algorithms, and compares them against a reference database using four levels of similarity analysis: surface, structural, primitive, and semantic. Scores from each level are combined into an overall similarity score. The system was tested through controlled verification cases and real non-novel examples identified by experts. Results showed clear separation between disguised derivations of the same algorithm and genuinely distinct algorithms, supporting the framework’s ability to measure algorithmic novelty. These findings suggest that automated detection of algorithmic plagiarism is feasible. It could support research integrity efforts by helping journals and reviewers identify submissions in need of close expert review.
title_zh: 保护科学算法：元启发式研究中检测算法抄袭的框架
abstract_zh: 学术不端行为日益通过算法重复的方式出现，即把经过轻微修改的现有方法伪装成新颖成果。这一问题在元启发式优化领域尤为突出，该领域虽发展迅猛，却也伴随着衍生算法的担忧。本文提出一种基于人工智能的框架，通过比较算法的计算逻辑而非表面相似性，来检测元启发式研究中的算法抄袭行为。该流程从学术PDF中提取伪代码，对算法进行规范化处理，并通过四个相似性分析维度（表层、结构、原始、语义）将其与参考数据库进行对比。各维度的得分合并为总体相似度评分。系统通过控制性验证案例及专家认定的非新颖实例进行测试。结果显示，同一算法的伪装变体与真正不同的算法之间存在明确区分，证明了该框架衡量算法新颖性的能力。这些发现表明，算法抄袭的自动化检测具备可行性。该方法可通过协助期刊和审稿人识别需要专家重点审查的投稿，从而维护科研诚信。

title: Prediction of Chip Aging-Induced VMIN Shift Based on Spice Simulation
authors: Haiyong Wang, Qi Wei, Chenfei Wu, Hailiang Zhang, Guohua Zhou, Keqing Ouyang
publish: 2026 Conference of Science and technology of Integrated Circuits (CSTIC)
abstract: Aging effects significantly degrade transistor performance, leading to increased minimum operating voltage (V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">min</inf>) in deep sub-micron technologies. This paper presents a SPICE-based simulation methodology to predict aging-induced V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">min</inf> shift by integrating compact aging models. The V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">min</inf> shift of simulation prediction align good with high-temperature operating life (HTOL) measured result. Results demonstrate the feasibility of simulation-driven V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">min</inf> shift prediction for robust circuit design over product lifetime.
title_zh: 基于Spice仿真的芯片老化导致的VMIN偏移预测
abstract_zh: 老化效应会显著降低晶体管性能，导致深亚微米工艺中最小工作电压（V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">min</inf>）上升。本文提出一种基于SPICE的仿真方法，通过集成紧凑型老化模型来预测老化引起的V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">min</inf>漂移。仿真预测的V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">min</inf>漂移与高温工作寿命（HTOL）实测结果吻合良好。结果表明，基于仿真的V<inf xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">min</inf>漂移预测方法可用于产品全生命周期内的稳健电路设计。
